event: Portal of the Abbey Church of Saint Laurent
symbols: rose window — the radiance of divine light filtered through sacred geometry
church portal — the entrance to sacred space, the threshold between world and worship
description: A detailed view of the exterior of a Gothic abbey church. The facade features pointed arched windows, a large rose window, flying buttresses, and ornate stone tracery. The roof is tiled in reddish-brown. Several small figures walk near the entrance at ground level, providing scale. Surrounding buildings and foliage frame the church. The palette is dominated by grays and browns of the aged stonework under an overcast sky.

_meta.title: Portal from the Abbey Church of Saint Laurent
